brandsSection.title:

vehicles.
brandsSection.desc: We also market vehicles from Mitsubishi, Isuzu, Suzuki, generators, motorcycles from Yamaha, and much more.
brandsSection.callout: We also handle exporting local and industrial products and various goods internationally.

achievements.title: Our Achievements
achievements.description: Discover our recent projects and our expertise in action through these significant milestones.
achievements.trustText: If a partner trusts us, why shouldn't you?
achievements.companyDesc: FAMATESS COMPANY supports institutions, businesses, and individuals in the acquisition and delivery of new vehicles throughout Cameroon.

partner.title: Partner Installation
partner.description: As part of our new vehicle sales and delivery activities, FAMATESS COMPANY ensured the delivery of a vehicle fleet to a partner in Douala — a leading institutional partner.

logisticsNetwork.label: Our Coverage Network
logisticsNetwork.title: From port to project,
logisticsNetwork.description: Operating from dual hubs in Yaoundé and Douala, our network extends across all of Cameroon's regions and into the CEMAC sub-region — giving your cargo a reliable path from origin to final destination.

regions.desc: Main logistics base, customer operations, warehousing and fleet management for Centre and South regions.
Port operations, container handling, customs clearance and maritime freight coordination at the Port of Douala.
Regular freight runs covering Bafoussam, Bamenda and the western highlands agricultural corridor.
Transport services covering Ngaoundéré, Garoua and Maroua, including Chad and CAR border crossings.
International freight corridors across Gabon, Congo, CAR and Chad — with full cross-border permits and documentation.
Access to the Kribi deep-water port for oversized and industrial cargo — ideal for mining and energy projects.

items.name: Toyota Land Cruiser V8 GXR LC 300
items.desc: The ultimate premium SUV. 3.3L twin-turbo V8 diesel engine, exceptional off-road capability, ideal for the most demanding terrains in Cameroon.

items.name: Toyota Hilux
items.desc: The most durable pickup in the world. Essential for construction sites, humanitarian missions, and professional travel in harsh terrain.

items.name: Toyota Land Cruiser Prado
items.desc: The perfect balance between urban comfort and off-road strength. Ideal for executives traveling across Cameroonian cities and remote areas.

items.name: Excavator
items.desc: High-performance hydraulic excavator for earthworks, foundations, mining, and large infrastructure projects.

items.name: Motor Grader
items.desc: Motor grader for road construction and maintenance, tracks, sports fields, and public works surfaces.

items.name: Bulldozer
items.desc: Tracked bulldozer for clearing, stripping, backfilling, and pushing materials on large mining and civil engineering sites.

items.name: Wheel Loader
items.desc: Wheel loader for bulk material loading, clearing, and heavy handling on construction sites and quarries.

items.name: Dump Truck
items.desc: Construction dump truck for transporting materials, backfill, and construction waste. Built for the toughest conditions.

aboutHero.label: About FAMATESS COMPANY
aboutHero.description: Founded in 2023, FAMATESS COMPANY is a multi-sector Cameroonian company delivering vehicles, construction, logistics and earthworks services across the country — with ambitions to grow throughout Central Africa.

aboutStory.label: Our Story
paragraphs: FAMATESS COMPANY was established in 2023 in Yaoundé, Cameroon, with a clear mission: to offer reliable, professional and accessible services in the sectors that matter most to Cameroon's growth — construction, transport, and vehicle supply.

In just a short time, we have built a solid reputation for honesty, quality of execution, and speed of delivery — partnering with individuals, businesses, public institutions and international organisations across the country.
Today we operate from Yaounde, Douala and Kribi, with a growing fleet, an experienced team, and the ambition to expand our footprint across the Central African sub-region.

milestones.title: Founded
milestones.desc: FAMATESS COMPANY officially registered and begins operations in Yaoundé.

milestones.title: Vehicle Sales
milestones.desc: Launch of new and used vehicle sales division — Toyota, Mitsubishi, Isuzu, Suzuki, Yamaha.

milestones.title: BTP Division
milestones.desc: Building & Public Works division opens, taking on first residential and road contracts.

milestones.title: Logistics Expansion
milestones.desc: Logistics & Transport division launched with dedicated heavy haulage and port operations.

milestones.title: Douala & Kribi
milestones.desc: Operations extended to Douala port hub and Kribi for deep-water cargo handling.

aboutValues.label: Our Values
aboutValues.description: These six values are not slogans — they are the standards we hold ourselves to in every project, every delivery, every conversation. They are the reason our clients come back.

items.title: Integrity
items.desc: We act with honesty and transparency in every relationship — with clients, partners, suppliers and our team. No hidden fees, no false promises.

items.title: Punctuality
items.desc: We commit to deadlines and honour them. Respect for your time and schedule is at the heart of how we plan and execute every project.

items.title: Excellence
items.desc: We set high standards for quality in everything we deliver — from vehicle condition to construction finishes and cargo safety.

items.title: Partnership
items.desc: We see every client as a long-term partner. Their success is our success — and we invest in building relationships that last.

items.title: Local Pride
items.desc: We are proudly Cameroonian. We hire locally, work with local suppliers, and are committed to contributing to the development of our communities.

items.title: Adaptability
items.desc: Africa's markets move fast. We stay agile, embrace new solutions, and continuously improve our services to meet evolving client needs.

items.title: Vehicle Sales
items.desc: New and used vehicle sales for individuals, companies and institutions. We supply light vehicles, pick-ups, SUVs and motorbikes from trusted brands.

items.title: Building & Public Works (BTP)
items.desc: Complete construction solutions — residential housing, commercial buildings, road building, and civil engineering across Cameroon.

items.title: Logistics & Transport
items.desc: End-to-end logistics: import/export freight, heavy haulage, road transport, warehousing and last-mile delivery across the CEMAC region.

items.title: Earthworks
items.desc: Professional earthmoving operations — site clearing, bulk excavation, grading, backfilling and slope stabilisation using our own heavy equipment.

cities.name: Yaoundé
cities.desc: Our main office, showroom and operations hub. Vehicle sales, BTP project management, logistics coordination and all administrative functions are based here.

cities.name: Douala
cities.desc: Our Douala office handles all port-related operations — cargo clearance, container management, sea freight coordination and distribution across the Littoral region.

cities.name: Kribi
cities.desc: Our Kribi presence enables direct access to the deep-water port — ideal for oversized project cargo, mining equipment, industrial machinery and energy sector logistics.

btpHero.label: Buildings & Public Works
btpHero.headline: Building the future
btpHero.description: FAMATESS COMPANY's BTP division delivers complete construction solutions — from residential housing and civil infrastructure to earthworks and road building — across Cameroon and beyond.

services.title: House Building
services.subtitle: Residential & Commercial Construction
services.desc: From individual villas to multi-storey residential complexes and commercial buildings, our teams deliver quality construction adapted to the Cameroonian climate and terrain.

services.title: Road Building
services.subtitle: Roads, Highways & Urban Infrastructure
services.desc: We design and construct durable roads and highway infrastructure, using modern machinery and materials suited to tropical conditions — from rural tracks to urban expressways.

services.title: Earthworks
services.subtitle: Excavation, Grading & Site Preparation
services.desc: Our heavy equipment fleet and skilled operators handle all earthmoving operations — from initial site clearing to precision grading, enabling construction projects to start on solid ground.

whyItems.title: Own Equipment Fleet
whyItems.desc: We own and operate our heavy machinery — no subcontracting delays, full schedule control.

whyItems.title: Certified Teams
whyItems.desc: All site supervisors and engineers hold nationally recognised qualifications and certifications.

whyItems.title: End-to-End Service
whyItems.desc: From design to delivery, a single contract covers everything — no hidden costs or scope gaps.

whyItems.title: Eco-Responsible
whyItems.desc: We minimise site waste, respect local ecosystems and comply with all environmental regulations.

header.label: Why FAMATESS BTP
header.title: The right partner for every construction challenge.

header.label: How We Work
header.title: A proven process from brief to delivery.
header.desc: Every FAMATESS BTP project follows a structured methodology that keeps your project on time, within budget, and built to last. We handle everything in-house — from initial study to final handover.

steps.title: Initial Consultation
steps.desc: We begin with a thorough site visit and client consultation to understand scope, budget, timeline and technical constraints.

steps.title: Study & Design
steps.desc: Our technical team produces detailed plans, feasibility studies, cost estimates and obtains all required administrative permits.

steps.title: Site Preparation
steps.desc: Earthworks and site preparation are carried out with our own fleet of heavy equipment — ensuring full control over quality and schedule.

steps.title: Construction
steps.desc: Structural works, civil engineering and finishing are executed by certified teams with regular quality control inspections at each phase.

steps.title: Quality Control
steps.desc: Each project milestone undergoes rigorous technical inspection and client validation before proceeding to the next phase.

steps.title: Delivery & After-care
steps.desc: We hand over completed projects with full documentation, warranties, and a dedicated after-care team for any post-delivery needs.

projects.title: Residential House
projects.desc: Construction of a 6-unit gated villa complex, including foundations, masonry, roofing, and full interior finishing.

projects.title: Urban Road Rehabilitation
projects.desc: Rehabilitation of 4.2 km of urban road including drainage channels, bituminous surfacing and road markings.

projects.title: Industrial Site Grading
projects.desc: Full site preparation for an industrial warehouse — clearing, bulk excavation, grading and compaction.

projects.title: Rural Access Road
projects.desc: 12 km of new rural road including subgrade preparation, culverts and gravel surfacing for all-season access.

projects.title: Commercial Office Building
projects.desc: Design and construction commercial office building

projects.title: Dam Embankment Works
projects.desc: Earthworks and embankment construction for a small irrigation dam, including slope stabilisation.

logisticsHero.label: Logistics & Transport
logisticsHero.description: FAMATESS COMPANY's Logistics division provides end-to-end transport and supply chain solutions from goods importation and heavy-load haulage to secure cargo tracking and last-mile delivery across Cameroon and the Central African sub-region.

header.label: Our Services
header.title: Four pillars of our logistics division.

services.title: Import & Export
services.subtitle: International Trade Logistics
services.desc: We manage the full import and export cycle for vehicles, machinery, industrial equipment and consumer goods — handling all shipping, customs clearance and documentation on your behalf.
points: Air freight for urgent or high-value cargo

services.title: Heavy Haulage
services.subtitle: Oversized & Special Cargo Transport
services.desc: Our fleet of low-loaders, flatbed trailers and heavy trucks is purpose-built for transporting construction machinery, industrial equipment and oversized cargo safely across the region.

whyItems.title: Fully Insured Cargo
whyItems.desc: All goods transported by FAMATESS are covered by comprehensive cargo insurance — giving you total peace of mind.

whyItems.title: Real-time GPS Tracking
whyItems.desc: Every vehicle in our fleet is GPS-equipped. You receive live updates and notifications throughout your shipment.

whyItems.title: End-to-end Documentation
whyItems.desc: We handle all shipping papers, customs declarations, transit permits and delivery records on your behalf.

whyItems.title: Single Point of Contact
whyItems.desc: One dedicated logistics coordinator manages your shipment from first contact to final delivery — no handoffs, no confusion.

header.label: How It Works
header.desc: Our 6-step logistics process is designed to give you full visibility and confidence at every stage — from the moment you contact us to the moment your goods arrive safely at destination.

steps.title: Enquiry & Quotation
steps.desc: Contact our logistics team with your cargo details. We assess requirements and provide a detailed, transparent quote within 24 hours.

steps.title: Planning & Routing
steps.desc: Our team plans the optimal route, selects the right vehicle, arranges permits and coordinates all customs documentation.

steps.title: Cargo Collection
steps.desc: We collect your goods from the origin point — port, warehouse, supplier — with proper loading, securing and inventory recording.

steps.title: Transport & Transit
steps.desc: Your cargo moves with our dedicated vehicle and driver. Real-time GPS tracking keeps you informed at every stage of the journey.

steps.title: Customs & Compliance
steps.desc: For cross-border and import/export shipments, we manage all customs formalities, duties, transit documents and border procedures.

steps.title: Delivery & Confirmation
steps.desc: Goods are delivered to the final destination with signed proof of delivery. Our team follows up to confirm your full satisfaction.

investorsStrip.body: FAMATESS COMPANY is listed on Euronext.

notFound.label: 404 — Page Not Found
notFound.description: The link you followed may be broken, moved, or no longer available. Head back to our homepage and find what you're looking for.

pillars.title: Eco-Friendly Fleet
pillars.desc: Our cars are energy-efficient and low-emission.

pillars.title: Clean Energy
pillars.desc: We promote renewable energy sources at our facilities.

pillars.title: Community Engagement
pillars.desc: Supporting local communities and social initiatives.

points.title: New Vehicle Importation
points.desc: Brand-new vehicles imported directly from manufacturers with full original warranties.

points.title: After-Sales Service
points.desc: Network of certified technicians and genuine spare parts available across Cameroon.

points.title: Customs Clearance Included
points.desc: Full management of customs procedures and import documentation.

points.title: Financing Solutions
points.desc: Leasing, credit, and financing options tailored to your projects.

heroChooseUs.label: Why Choose Us
heroChooseUs.description: FAMATESS COMPANY supports its clients in all their business operations across Cameroon. Reliability, expertise, and transparency are our commitments.

header.label: Our Commitments
header.desc: Every commitment we make to our clients reflects our core values: operational excellence, integrity, and customer satisfaction.

reasons.title: Experienced and Responsive Team
reasons.desc: Qualified professionals ready to meet your needs quickly and expertly.

reasons.title: Strict Deadline Compliance
reasons.desc: We commit to precise timelines and honor all our contractual agreements.

reasons.title: Competitive and Transparent Pricing
reasons.desc: Fair prices with no surprises — detailed quotes, clear billing, no hidden fees.

reasons.title: Customer Satisfaction at the Heart
reasons.desc: Your success is our mission. We provide personalized follow-up at every step.

footer.tagline: The right service at the best price

introBand.text: Welcome to Famatess Company legal information.

hostingProvider.text1: The Famatess websites are hosted by:
hostingProvider.text2: Content delivery and DNS management are handled via Cloudflare, Inc. (101 Townsend St, San Francisco, CA 94107, USA).
hostingProvider.infoBox: All user data is stored on servers located within the European Economic Area (EEA) in compliance with GDPR requirements for international data transfers.

intellectualProperty.text1: All content on Famatess Company websites — including but not limited to text, articles, press releases, photographs, logos, graphics, illustrations, videos, animations, and software — is the exclusive property of Famatess Company or has been licensed for use by Famatess Company from its rightful owners.
intellectualProperty.text2: This content is protected by French and international intellectual property laws, including:
protectedItems: French Intellectual Property Code (Code de la Propriété Intellectuelle)
Directive 2001/29/EC of the European Parliament on copyright in the information society
Berne Convention for the Protection of Literary and Artistic Works
TRIPS Agreement (Trade-Related Aspects of Intellectual Property Rights)
intellectualProperty.strictlyProhibited: Strictly Prohibited Without Prior Written Authorisation
intellectualProperty.trademarkText: The Famatess Company® name and logo, as well as all product and service names referenced on this website, are registered trademarks of Famatess Company. Any unauthorised use constitutes trademark infringement.
intellectualProperty.contact: For authorisation requests, please contact: legal@famatesscompanysa@gmail.com

limitationOfLiability.text1: Famatess makes every effort to ensure the accuracy, completeness, and currency of the information published on its websites. However, the information is provided for general informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, financial, or professional advice.
limitationOfLiability.warning: Famatess cannot be held liable for any direct or indirect damages, loss of data, loss of opportunity, or any other prejudice arising from the use of or inability to use the information contained on this website.
limitationOfLiability.text2: In particular, Famatess Company accepts no liability for:
limitationOfLiability.text3: The information published on this website relating to financial performance, forward-looking statements, and market projections is subject to risks and uncertainties that could cause actual results to differ materially.

hyperlinksExternal.text1: This website may contain links to third-party websites operated independently of Famatess Company. These links are provided for convenience only.
hyperlinksExternal.text2: If you wish to create a hyperlink to this website, you must obtain prior written authorisation from Famatess Company. Any deep-linking, framing, or inline linking of our content is strictly prohibited without express written consent.
hyperlinksExternal.text3: To request authorisation for linking: webmaster@famatesscompanysa@gmail.com

personalDataProtection.text1: Famatess Company processes personal data in accordance with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR — Regulation 2016/679) and applicable national data protection laws.
personalDataProtection.text2: You have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict, and port your personal data, as well as the right to object to certain processing activities. For full details, please consult our Personal Data Policy.
personalDataProtection.text3: To exercise your rights or for any data protection enquiry, contact our Data Protection Officer at: dpo@famatesscompanysa@gmail.com
personalDataProtection.text4: If you are not satisfied with our response, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the CNIL (Commission Nationale de l'Informatique et des Libertés) at www.cnil.fr.

cookiesSection.text1: This website uses cookies and similar tracking technologies to ensure proper functionality, analyse traffic, and improve the user experience.
cookiesSection.text2: For full information on the cookies we use and to manage your preferences, please consult our Cookies Policy.

applicableLaw.text1: These Legal Mentions are governed by and construed in accordance with French law, without prejudice to any mandatory provisions of local law applicable in the user's country of residence.
applicableLaw.text2: In the event of any dispute arising from the use of this website or its content that cannot be resolved amicably, exclusive jurisdiction is conferred upon the courts of Paris, France, unless mandatory consumer protection laws in the user's jurisdiction provide otherwise.
applicableLaw.text3: For users in Cameroonian markets, Famatess Company also complies with applicable national digital economy laws, including ECOWAS Supplementary Act A/SA.1/01/10 on Personal Data Protection and equivalent regional instruments.
applicableLaw.text4: Users based in the European Union also benefit from the protections afforded by applicable EU consumer law and may use the EU Online Dispute Resolution platform: ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr
